gatewayArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the gateway.

workloadIdentityDetails.description: The workload identity details for the gateway.

exceptionLevel.description:
The level of detail in error messages returned when invoking the gateway.

  • If the value is DEBUG, granular exception messages are returned to help a user debug the gateway.

  • If the value is omitted, a generic error message is returned to the end user.

gatewayArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the gateway.

targetConfiguration.description: The configuration for a gateway target. This structure defines how the gateway connects to and interacts with the target endpoint.
